title: Remote Controlled Mini Forklift
description: Arduino Nano + NRF24L01 RC mini forklift with 4-wheel differential drive and 2-stage scissor lift driven by worm-gear motor + lead screw, capable of lifting 1 kg loads to 250 mm.
objective: Lift 1 kg load to 250 mm; differential drive manoeuvrability; NRF24L01 RC range ≥ 20 m; fork width 150 mm.
constraints: 12 V LiPo; BOM < ₹3500; Arduino Nano; total weight < 500 g.
supporting_fact_titles: Scissor Lift / Pantograph — Mechanical Advantage and Geometry
design_element_titles: RC Mini Forklift — Scissor Lift and Drive Mechanism
L298N Dual H-Bridge Motor Driver Module

element_usage_notes.RC Mini Forklift — Scissor Lift and Driv: 4× N20 gear motors for drive; worm-gear motor + 2 mm pitch lead screw for lift.
element_usage_notes.Worm Gear Lead-Screw Linear Actuator: Self-locking 20:1 worm prevents scissor back-drive under 1 kg load.
